content:
Prepping for Homework & Next Readings
Applying New Concepts to Past Readings


✅ Why This Works:
• Balanced mix of guided, student-led, and independent work.
• Ties into both macro-level and micro-level thematic structures.
• Builds toward final projects while keeping engagement high.

🎥 4. Weeks 11-12: Thematic Film Pairings

Film Selection Process
• Students propose films (Week 9).
• Thread is locked Week 10.
• Students vote by “liking” recommendations.
• Winning two films are announced before Week 11.

Contrast in Film Choices
